final:
module RefModule (  
    input wire J,  
    input wire K,  
    input wire CLK,  
    input wire RST,  
    output reg Q  
);  
    always @(posedge CLK or posedge RST) begin  
        if (RST) begin  
            Q <= 0;  
        end else begin  
            case ({J, K})  
                2'b00: Q <= Q;         // No change  
                2'b01: Q <= 0;         // Reset  
                2'b10: Q <= 1;         // Set  
                2'b11: Q <= ~Q;        // Toggle  
            endcase  
        end  
    end  
  always @(*) begin
    if (1'b0) begin
    end
  end

endmodule
